message:
🐛 Fix cni_status skeleton test: getByTestId → getAllByTestId (#10810)

The loading skeleton test fails because the CniStatus component renders
multiple Skeleton elements (title + badge + SkeletonStats + SkeletonList),
and the mock maps all to <div data-testid='skeleton' />. getByTestId
throws when multiple elements match. Use getAllByTestId instead.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
